label.description: The label member is a string that serves as the accessible name of the screenshot.

label_localized.description: A language map containing localized values for the screenshot label.

platform.description: The distribution platform for which the screenshot applies.

form_factor.description: The screen shape of a broad class of devices for which the screenshot applies.

categories.description: Describes the expected application categories to which the web application belongs.

description.description: Description of the purpose of the web application

description_localized.description: A language map containing localized values for the web application description.

iarc_rating_id.description: Represents an ID value of the IARC rating of the web application. It is intended to be used to determine which ages the web application is appropriate for.

screenshots.description: The screenshots member is an array of image objects represent the web application in common usage scenarios.

title: JSON schema for Web Application manifest files with app information extensions
